title: Villager Trade Cycler
description: A mod that cycles villagers for you until you find your desired trade, intended for librarian villagers.
body:
A mod that cycles villagers for you until you find your desired trade, intended for librarian villagers.
You can enter any enchant you want in the top bar, desired level below that, multiple enchantments separated by commas. Max price is prioritized, so if you find for example Power V that costs 22 emeralds, but your max cost is 21, it will be ignored and continue cycling.
Claim wait time can be adjustable to let villagers claim the lectern, useful for playing on high ping, or villagers not cooperating for any reason.

![Example of looking for 3 enchantments at the same time.](https://i.imgur.com/kg9qigp.png)
